idea-plugin.name: Move to version catalog
idea-plugin.description:
A focused intention for Gradle Kotlin DSL projects: move a hardcoded dependency or plugin coordinate from build.gradle.kts into the Gradle version catalog at gradle/libs.versions.toml.

What it does

  • Adds the coordinate under [libraries] (for dependencies { }) or [plugins] (for plugins { }) in libs.versions.toml.
  • Replaces the call site with libs.<alias> or alias(libs.plugins.<alias>).
